name: Allo Plugin Marketplace
description: Official Allo MCP and CLI plugin marketplace

plugins.name: playwright-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via Playwright MCP for UI validation, screenshots, console, and network inspection.
plugins.author: allo-official
plugins.notes: Install stores the MCP command only. The browser MCP server is not launched during install.

plugins.name: github-tools
plugins.description: GitHub repository operations through MCP, including issues, pull requests, and repository metadata.
plugins.author: allo-official

credentials.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
credentials.description: Used to access GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests.

plugins.notes: Requires GITHUB_TOKEN before runtime use. Install does not validate or use the token.

plugins.name: filesystem-tools
plugins.author: allo-official
plugins.notes: ALLO_WORKSPACE_PATH is injected by Allo at runtime. Do not point this plugin at a home directory or filesystem root.

plugins.name: dfcode-enterprise-mcp
plugins.description: DFCode Enterprise MCP Server for querying organization dashboard, usage analytics, user management, audit logs, and model endpoints.
plugins.author: dfcode

tools.name: query_dashboard
tools.description: Organization dashboard overview including today/7d/month usage stats, active members, model distribution, and top employees.

tools.name: query_usage
tools.description: Usage detail and aggregation queries with single and cross-dimension aggregation support.

tools.name: query_users
tools.description: Query member list and activity status.

tools.name: query_user_detail
tools.description: Query a specific member's profile including basic info, MAAS quota, device list, and roster status.

tools.name: query_employee_detail
tools.description: Query a specific member's detailed usage analysis including overview, daily trends, model distribution, and raw entries.

tools.name: query_audit_logs
tools.description: Query audit logs including admin operations, employee logins, and device authorizations.

tools.name: query_roster
tools.description: Query employee roster/directory with search by name, employee ID, department, and status.

tools.name: query_model_endpoints
tools.description: Query local model endpoint list including name, provider, status, and pricing.

tools.name: query_maas_models
tools.description: Query logical model list from MAAS gateway in real-time, including enabled status, groups, and capability tags.

tools.name: query_user_devices
tools.description: Query a specific member's device list.

tools.name: query_departments
tools.description: Cross-department analysis with range filters: usage, WoW growth, daily trends, model breakdown, and top employees per department.

tools.name: query_department_employee_detail
tools.description: Enriched admin employee detail: profile, MAAS summary, devices, usage overview, daily trends, model distribution, and paginated entries.

tools.name: query_employee_portal_stats
tools.description: Employee portal statistics for a specific user: summary, daily trend, model distribution, and optional 365-day activity heatmap.

tools.name: query_announcements
tools.description: Query announcement list with title, content, pinned status, and timestamps.

tools.name: query_feedback
tools.description: Query employee feedback list including content, submitter name, employee ID, department, and submission time.

credentials.label: DFCode API Key
credentials.description: API key for authenticating with DFCode Enterprise MCP Server. Sent as X-API-Key header.

plugins.notes: SSE-based MCP connection. The API key is sent as X-API-Key header during SSE handshake and JSON-RPC requests.

plugins.name: tavily-search
plugins.description: AI-optimized search engine that delivers comprehensive, accurate, and trusted results. Designed specifically for AI agents and RAG pipelines with structured JSON responses.
plugins.author: allo-official

credentials.label: Tavily API Key
credentials.description: API key for Tavily search service.

plugins.name: firecrawl
plugins.description: Web scraping and crawling API that converts any website into clean, LLM-ready markdown. Supports JavaScript rendering, pagination, and structured data extraction.
plugins.author: allo-official

credentials.label: Firecrawl API Key
credentials.description: API key for Firecrawl web scraping service.

plugins.name: jina-ai-reader
plugins.description: Extract clean, readable content from any URL using Jina AI's Reader API. Returns markdown-formatted text optimized for LLM consumption with support for PDFs and dynamic pages.
plugins.author: allo-official

credentials.label: Jina AI API Key
credentials.description: API key for Jina AI Reader service.

plugins.name: duckduckgo-search
plugins.description: Privacy-focused web search powered by DuckDuckGo. No API key required. Returns organic search results with titles, snippets, and URLs.
plugins.author: allo-official
plugins.notes: No API key required. Ready to use after install.

plugins.name: code-sandbox
plugins.description: Secure, isolated code execution environment for running Python, JavaScript, and shell scripts. Supports file I/O, package installation, and long-running processes with configurable timeouts.
plugins.author: allo-official
plugins.notes: No API key required. Ready to use after install.

plugins.name: excel-mcp
plugins.description: Read, write, and format xlsx/xls spreadsheets from AI agents via MCP. Node.js based with full read/write/format/sheet management support.
plugins.author: allo-official

tools.name: read_excel
tools.description: Read a worksheet or a specific range (e.g. A1:C100) from an xlsx/xls file. Optionally include formulas and formatting details.

tools.name: write_excel
tools.description: Write data to an xlsx file. Supports overwrite, append, and update modes, with optional headers and a custom start cell.

tools.name: format_excel
tools.description: Apply font, fill, border, alignment, and number format (currency, percent, date) to a cell range.

tools.name: manage_sheets
tools.description: List, create, rename, copy, or delete worksheets inside an xlsx workbook.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Get workbook metadata including size, sheet list, sheet row/column counts, and last modified time.

plugins.notes: WORK_DIR is injected by Allo at runtime and confines file operations to the current workspace. EXCEL_ALLOW_WRITE=true enables create/modify/format. Do not point WORK_DIR at a home directory or filesystem root.

plugins.name: excel-mcp-go
plugins.description: Lightweight Go-based MCP server for reading and writing xlsx/xlsm/xltx/xltm and CSV files. Cross-platform native binary with no Node/Python runtime required.
plugins.author: allo-official

tools.name: read_excel
tools.description: Read an xlsx/xlsm/xltx/xltm file and return data as JSON.

tools.name: read_csv
tools.description: Read a CSV file and return data as JSON.

tools.name: write_excel
tools.description: Write JSON data to an xlsx or CSV file. Correctly formats integers and floats to avoid scientific notation.

plugins.notes: Ships as a native Go binary via npm; no Python or Node runtime required at install time. Ideal as a lightweight fallback to the heavier Node/Python Excel MCPs.

plugins.name: excel-mcp-pro
plugins.description: Feature-rich Excel MCP server with formula read/write, style formatting, tables, and sheet copy. Bundles Python + openpyxl in a Node.js launcher.
plugins.author: allo-official

tools.name: excel_describe_sheets
tools.description: List all sheet information of a specified Excel file.

tools.name: excel_read_sheet
tools.description: Read values from an Excel sheet with pagination. Optionally return formulas or cell style information.

tools.name: excel_write_to_sheet
tools.description: Write values or formulas (any cell starting with '=') to an Excel sheet. Can create a new sheet or write to an existing one.

tools.name: excel_create_table
tools.description: Create a named table over a range in an Excel sheet.

tools.name: excel_copy_sheet
tools.description: Copy an existing sheet to a new sheet within the same workbook.

tools.name: excel_format_range
tools.description: Format a cell range with per-cell styles: borders, fonts, fills, number formats, decimal places.

tools.name: excel_screen_capture
tools.description: Take a screenshot of a sheet range. Windows only - the call will fail on macOS/Linux.

plugins.notes: The npm package bundles a Python runtime + openpyxl (~105MB unpacked). No separate Python install needed, but the first launch is slower. This server does not enforce a workspace path - every tool takes fileAbsolutePath from the agent, so pair it with filesystem-tools bound to ALLO_WORKSPACE_PATH if sandboxing is required.

plugins.name: pdf-reader-mcp
plugins.description: Read text, images, and metadata from PDF files via a single read_pdf tool. Parallel page processing, Y-coordinate content ordering, and absolute/relative path support.
plugins.author: allo-official

tools.name: read_pdf
tools.description: Extract text, images, and metadata from one or more PDF files. Supports page ranges, Y-coordinate content ordering, and configurable per-call flags (full text, metadata, page count, images).

plugins.notes: Read-only. Useful for letting agents read PDF reports that were exported from Excel. Pair with filesystem-tools bound to ALLO_WORKSPACE_PATH to keep path access sandboxed.
